title: taraxacum krylovii
intro: Taraxacum krylovii, also known as Krylov's dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, Taraxacum. This perennial plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum krylovii include its ability to help with digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a variety of preparations to be used for its medicinal and health benefits.
